entities.description: layout aware segmentation is a paradigm that parses documents into structured blocks to preserve original layout and information
docetl is a state of the art method providing a declarative interface for defining llm based processing pipelines
llm refers to large language models used in processing pipelines for analyzing retrieved blocks
multimodal retrieval is a technique applied to obtain relevant content from blocks with multimodal characteristics
paragraphs are structural blocks within a document preserved by layout aware segmentation
tables are structural blocks within a document preserved by layout aware segmentation
figures are structural blocks within a document preserved by layout aware segmentation
equations are structural blocks within a document preserved by layout aware segmentation
the first paradigm is a method that uses fixed chunk sizes  often leading to fragmented information
the second paradigm refers to layout aware segmentation  which preserves document structure
the declarative interface is a feature provided by docetl that allows users to define processing pipelines
processing pipelines are sequences of operations defined by users to analyze retrieved blocks
llm based processing pipelines are pipelines that utilize large language models for analysis
llm powered operations are the specific tasks combined within the processing pipelines
task specific optimizations are enhancements applied to the pipelines for specific tasks
fixed chunk size is a parameter used in the first paradigm that can cause information fragmentation
document native structural information is the data retained by layout aware segmentation
relevant content is the information obtained through multimodal retrieval to answer queries
queries are the questions or requests for which relevant content is retrieved

relations.description: layout aware segmentation parses documents into paragraphs to preserve their structure
layout aware segmentation parses documents into tables to preserve their structure
layout aware segmentation parses documents into figures to preserve their structure
layout aware segmentation parses documents into equations to preserve their structure
docetl uses llm powered operations to create processing pipelines
multimodal retrieval is a typical approach applied to blocks generated by layout aware segmentation
docetl is a state of the art method within the category of layout aware segmentation
the second paradigm is identified as layout aware segmentation in the text
the first paradigm uses a fixed chunk size  which leads to fragmented information
docetl provides a declarative interface for users
the declarative interface allows users to define processing pipelines
processing pipelines consist of llm powered operations
processing pipelines include task specific optimizations
layout aware segmentation retains document native structural information
multimodal retrieval is used to obtain relevant content
multimodal retrieval is applied to answer queries
